item.title: Export Watermark (Made with easy-markdown)
item.intent: Every exported PDF is a billboard — a subtle watermark drives organic discovery without being obnoxious.
item.description: Per PRODUCT.md §12. When exporting rendered PDF, include a subtle "Made with easy-markdown" watermark in the footer. User can disable in settings. Tasteful, not tacky — small, light gray, bottom margin. Never appears on printed output unless user explicitly enables it.
acceptanceCriteria: Exported PDF includes subtle footer watermark by default
Watermark can be disabled in settings
Watermark is unobtrusive — small, light gray, does not interfere with content
Print output does not include watermark by default
